'''βàös-dh-r-n''' ('''kasadhrenoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yaya|yaya]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-dh-r-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yaya|yaya]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| βàös-dh-r-n
|-
! Lemma
| kasadhrenoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisadhrenoko|thisadhrenoko]] || [[word:jisadhrenoko|jisadhrenoko]] || [[word:shisadhrenoko|shisadhrenoko]] || [[word:kisadhrenoko|kisadhrenoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusadhrenoko|thuthusadhrenoko]] || [[word:jujusadhrenoko|jujusadhrenoko]] || [[word:shushusadhrenoko|shushusadhrenoko]] || [[word:kukusadhrenoko|kukusadhrenoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thusadhrenoko|thusadhrenoko]] || [[word:jusadhrenoko|jusadhrenoko]] || [[word:shusadhrenoko|shusadhrenoko]] || [[word:kusadhrenoko|kusadhrenoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thusadhrenoko|thusadhrenoko]] || [[word:jusadhrenoko|jusadhrenoko]] || [[word:shusadhrenoko|shusadhrenoko]] || [[word:kusadhrenoko|kusadhrenoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thesadhrenoko|thesadhrenoko]] || [[word:jesadhrenoko|jesadhrenoko]] || [[word:shesadhrenoko|shesadhrenoko]] || [[word:kesadhrenoko|kesadhrenoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothosadhrenoko|thothosadhrenoko]] || [[word:jojosadhrenoko|jojosadhrenoko]] || [[word:shoshosadhrenoko|shoshosadhrenoko]] || [[word:kokosadhrenoko|kokosadhrenoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thosadhrenoko|thosadhrenoko]] || [[word:josadhrenoko|josadhrenoko]] || [[word:shosadhrenoko|shosadhrenoko]] || [[word:kosadhrenoko|kosadhrenoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosadhrenoko|thosadhrenoko]] || [[word:josadhrenoko|josadhrenoko]] || [[word:shosadhrenoko|shosadhrenoko]] || [[word:kosadhrenoko|kosadhrenoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thΟΠsadhrenoko|thΟΠsadhrenoko]] || [[word:jΟΠsadhrenoko|jΟΠsadhrenoko]] || [[word:shΟΠsadhrenoko|shΟΠsadhrenoko]] || [[word:kΟΠsadhrenoko|kΟΠsadhrenoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasadhrenoko|thasadhrenoko]] || [[word:jasadhrenoko|jasadhrenoko]] || [[word:shasadhrenoko|shasadhrenoko]] || [[word:kasadhrenoko|kasadhrenoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasadhrenoko|thasadhrenoko]] || [[word:jasadhrenoko|jasadhrenoko]] || [[word:shasadhrenoko|shasadhrenoko]] || [[word:kasadhrenoko|kasadhrenoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
